summary: Iteration 49 - Monthly P&L Review Enhanced Features Testing Complete. All 20 backend tests passed. Frontend testing verified all new features: scheduler badge, history drawer (11 stored reviews), generate review button, comparison table with MoM/YoY, distribution info banner, KPI cards, resort health bar, AI narrative, causal factors, and outlet reports sections.
seed_data_creation: None required - uses existing EchoStratus data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 49 tested the enhanced Monthly P&L Review features in EchoStratus. All backend endpoints working: POST /api/echo-stratus/monthly-review/generate, GET /api/echo-stratus/reviews/latest (with role-based scoping), GET /api/echo-stratus/reviews/history, GET /api/echo-stratus/reviews/{review_id}, GET /api/echo-stratus/reviews/notifications/pending, GET /api/echo-stratus/scheduler/status. MoM comparisons work correctly - generating consecutive months shows mom_available=true with delta values. Frontend Review tab shows: scheduler badge ('Auto-scheduled 1st of month'), History button with count, Generate Review button, comparison table with MoM/YoY periods, distribution info banner, 7 KPI cards, resort health bar with score, AI narrative, causal factors, and outlet reports. No .zip files found in /app/client/modules/.

backend_endpoints.monthly_review_generate: PASS - POST /api/echo-stratus/monthly-review/generate returns complete review with resort_pnl, outlet_reports, comparisons, health_summary
backend_endpoints.reviews_latest_executive: PASS - GET /api/echo-stratus/reviews/latest?role=executive returns full resort review
backend_endpoints.reviews_latest_outlet_manager: PASS - GET /api/echo-stratus/reviews/latest?role=outlet_manager&outlet_id=out-main-kitchen returns scoped outlet review with scope='outlet'
backend_endpoints.reviews_history: PASS - GET /api/echo-stratus/reviews/history returns list of stored reviews with metadata
backend_endpoints.scheduler_status: PASS - GET /api/echo-stratus/scheduler/status returns running=true with monthly_pnl_review job

mom_comparisons.mom_available_after_two_months: PASS - Feb review has mom_available=true after Jan exists
mom_comparisons.mom_delta_values: PASS - MoM comparisons include previous, delta, delta_pct fields
mom_comparisons.outlet_comparisons: PASS - outlet_comparisons dict includes per-outlet MoM/YoY data

frontend_review_view.scheduler_badge: PASS - data-testid='scheduler-badge' visible with 'Auto-scheduled 1st of month'
frontend_review_view.history_drawer: PASS - data-testid='review-history' shows stored reviews grid (Jan-Nov 2026)
frontend_review_view.comparison_table: PASS - data-testid='comparison-table' shows Period Comparison with MoM/YoY badges
frontend_review_view.distribution_info: PASS - data-testid='distribution-info' shows role-based distribution message
frontend_review_view.kpi_cards: PASS - 7 cards (Revenue, EBITDA, Food%, Labor%, Events, Covers, Avg Check)
frontend_review_view.health_summary: PASS - data-testid='health-summary' with health bar and score

mocked_apis.weather_data: MOCKED - simulated by season/month, no external weather API
mocked_apis.ai_narrative: Uses Emergent LLM Key with deterministic fallback if LLM times out
